rationale: Section 49.306 operates on 'taxable value of property' as a computed input and does not reference the homestead exemption amount or Tax Code §11.13(b). The increased exemption would flow through automatically via reduced taxable values; no statutory amendment is required.
quote: the district's taxable value of property does not exceed the value necessary to generate maintenance and operations tax revenue in the amount equal to the district's entitlement under Section 48.202(a-1)(2)
_note: No direct textual conflict. The statute uses taxable value as an input variable; the proposed homestead exemption increase would alter that input but does not require amendment of §49.306 itself.
